review_text: App crashes every time I try to open the task manager after the latest update. Happens on my Pixel 7 running Android 14. Already tried reinstalling but no luck.
Since updating to 3.0.1 I can't login at all. It just shows a blank white screen after entering my password. iPhone 13 iOS 17.4
Would love a dark mode option. I use this app at night and the bright white background is really harsh on the eyes. Please consider adding it!
Absolutely love this app. It has completely transformed how I manage my daily tasks. The reminder system is perfect. Keep up the great work!
The app is good overall but it feels slow when loading large task lists. Sometimes takes 4-5 seconds just to open a project with 50+ tasks.
Data sync between my iPhone and iPad stopped working after the update. I lost two days worth of tasks. This is unacceptable for a productivity app.
Please add a calendar integration with Google Calendar. It would be so much more useful if tasks could sync directly to my calendar.
Best productivity app I have used. Clean UI intuitive design and the collaboration features work flawlessly with my remote team.
The subscription price went up by 40% with no new features. Very disappointing. Considering switching to a competitor.
